ModDescription: Sigil synthesis at Siero's, fully under your control - two features, both optional.  (1) ALWAYS GRAND SUCCESS: every synthesis is a Grand Success, so the result's traits come out maxed at Lv15. Vanilla rolls Success/Great/Grand with Grand between 45% and 85% depending on your inputs' Prospect score; this pins Grand to 100% at every score.  (2) CHOOSE RESULT TRAITS: vanilla picks the result's two traits at random from the four traits of your two input sigils - that's the '1/12 Prospects' the screen cycles through. Turn this on and you decide exactly which two, every time (defaults to trait 1 of the first sigil + trait 2 of the second). The first trait also decides which sigil you get. Traits apply instantly; the Grand Success toggle needs a game restart (tables are generated from vanilla data at every launch - nothing on disk is modified). Built for Endless Ragnarok 2.0; the trait feature disables itself safely if a game update moves the code it hooks.
